final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar icon for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products — suitable for all major social platforms globally.

Style/medium: clean flat vector illustration, modern tech-lifestyle aesthetic, icon-grade simplicity
Subject: a compact symbolic composition combining a sleek EV silhouette, a small digital device (smartphone or earbuds), and a lifestyle spark or star accent — arranged as a unified badge or emblem with balanced negative space
Composition: centered square composition with generous padding, icon-safe layout readable at 64×64 px
Color palette: electric blue as primary brand color, clean white as background, a single warm accent (soft gold or mint green) for the lifestyle element — no red, no religious or culturally charged symbols
Text (verbatim): none
Constraints: must read clearly at small sizes (favicon / app icon); monochrome version must remain legible; no human faces, no hands, no flags, no religious iconography, no culturally specific symbols that may offend any group
Avoid: gradients that muddy at small scale; overly complex line work; photorealistic textures; country-specific imagery; gender or ethnicity markers; Behance generic flat-icon clichés
